title: agastache aurantiaca
intro: Agastache aurantiaca, also known as Orange Giant Hyssop, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Agastache aurantiaca include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Agastache aurantiaca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salves and ointments to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
